title: Verify the 'Loss Aversion' gate presents the correct options
description: Tests that clicking 'Cancel/Pause Trial' triggers the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up with the correct headline, body text, and button hierarchy.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort.
expected_result: The modal headline is 'Wait! Don't lose your free days.' The primary action is 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' (high prominence). The secondary action is 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' (low prominence).
